Job Location:&nbsp;Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

	A qualified and licensed medical laboratory technician needed to work at a medical laboratory within a hospital.
	Applicants should live close to Anthony Village, areas such as Shomolu, Ketu, Ojota, Ilupeju, Maryland, Gbagada, Anthony will be given priority. Female candidate preferred.


Requirements


	Assist the Medical laboratory Scientist in diagnosing patients
	Collect blood sample of patients.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;kingsolomonhosp@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Medical Laboratory Technician Job at King Solomon Hospital




        
    

        
        King Solomon Hospital is a hospital that has existed for over 45 years, functioning with excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Laboratory Technician
Job Location: Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A qualified and licensed medical laboratory technician needed to work at a medical laboratory within a hospital.
	Applicants should live close to Anthony Village, areas such as Shomolu, Ketu, Ojota, Ilupeju, Maryland, Gbagada, Anthony will be given priority. Female candidate preferred.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist the Medical laboratory Scientist in diagnosing patients
	Collect blood sample of patients.


Method of Application

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Supervisor",
  "description": "Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria&rsquo;s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement&mdash;indeed, a rallying point&mdash;for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value.&nbsp;Beyond swallows, we are committed to showcasing the versatility of healthy flour-based products to Nigerians and the wider African market. Our product development strategy focuses on unlocking a broad spectrum of applications for our nutritious flour blends across multiple food categories.

Accordingly, we are specifically devoted to the research, development, and production of healthy alternative Swallows, Beverages, Cereals, and Confectionery products designed to promote improved dietary choices and overall well-being.&nbsp;Although Elkris Foods was originally established in the United Kingdom, we strategically relocated operations to Nigeria to position the business within one of the world&rsquo;s fastest-growing population hubs. With projections indicating that Nigeria will rank among the top three most populous nations globally by 2030, we recognize a significant opportunity to serve a rapidly expanding consumer base.&nbsp;Our strategic objective is clear: by 2030, we aim to have at least one Elkris Foods brand present at breakfast, lunch, or dinner in no fewer than 20 million households across Nigeria annually. Through this ambition, we seek not only commercial growth but also to champion and embed a culture of healthy eating within the Nigerian population and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Supervisor

Job Locations:&nbsp;Edo, Ibadan - Oyo, and Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Industry: FMCG (Food Manufacturing &amp; Packaging)

Job Summary


	As part of our expansion drive, we are seeking an experienced and results-driven Business Development Supervisor to lead market growth initiatives in Port Harcourt.
	The Business Development Supervisor will be responsible for driving sales growth, market expansion, and team performance within the assigned territory.
	The role involves supervising field operations, identifying new business opportunities, managing client relationships, and ensuring the achievement of sales and distribution targets.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development &amp; Sales Growth:


	Drive revenue growth and market penetration within Port Harcourt and surrounding areas
	Identify and develop new business opportunities, including retail, wholesale, and institutional clients
	Execute sales strategies to achieve monthly and quarterly targets
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs


Team Supervision &amp; Field Operations:


	Supervise and coordinate field marketers and sales agents
	Ensure effective territory coverage and route planning
	Monitor team performance and enforce daily productivity targets
	Provide coaching, guidance, and performance feedback to team members


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, retailers, and key accounts
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and retention
	Resolve escalated client issues promptly and professionally


Reporting &amp; Performance Management:


	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports
	Track KPIs and provide insights to improve performance
	Ensure accurate documentation of sales activities and client data


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field with&nbsp;3&ndash;5 years of experience in FMCG sales or business development
	Proven experience in team supervision and target-driven environments
	Strong knowledge of Port Harcourt market and distribution channels
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and leadership skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.


Key Competencies:


	Strong sales and commercial acumen
	Leadership and team management
	Strategic thinking and execution
	Customer relationship management
	Data-driven decision-making.


Salary
N250,000 - N350,000 / Month (Plus Performance Incentives).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;michealani@zohomail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location (E.g: &quot;Business Development Supervisor &ndash; Either &quot;Port Harcourt, Benin City Or Ibadan&quot;) as the subject of the email.",

    "@type": "Organization",

Business Development Supervisor Job at Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria’s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement—indeed, a rallying point—for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value. Beyond swallows, we are committed to showcasing the versatility of healthy flour-based products to Nigerians and the wider African market. Our product development strategy focuses on unlocking a broad spectrum of applications for our nutritious flour blends across multiple food categories.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Accordingly, we are specifically devoted to the research, development, and production of healthy alternative Swallows, Beverages, Cereals, and Confectionery products designed to promote improved dietary choices and overall well-being. Although Elkris Foods was originally established in the United Kingdom, we strategically relocated operations to Nigeria to position the business within one of the world’s fastest-growing population hubs. With projections indicating that Nigeria will rank among the top three most populous nations globally by 2030, we recognize a significant opportunity to serve a rapidly expanding consumer base. Our strategic objective is clear: by 2030, we aim to have at least one Elkris Foods brand present at breakfast, lunch, or dinner in no fewer than 20 million households across Nigeria annually. Through this ambition, we seek not only commercial growth but also to champion and embed a culture of healthy eating within the Nigerian population and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Supervisor

Job Locations: Edo, Ibadan - Oyo, and Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Industry: FMCG (Food Manufacturing & Packaging)

Job Summary


	As part of our expansion drive, we are seeking an experienced and results-driven Business Development Supervisor to lead market growth initiatives in Port Harcourt.
	The Business Development Supervisor will be responsible for driving sales growth, market expansion, and team performance within the assigned territory.
	The role involves supervising field operations, identifying new business opportunities, managing client relationships, and ensuring the achievement of sales and distribution targets.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development & Sales Growth:


	Drive revenue growth and market penetration within Port Harcourt and surrounding areas
	Identify and develop new business opportunities, including retail, wholesale, and institutional clients
	Execute sales strategies to achieve monthly and quarterly targets
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs


Team Supervision & Field Operations:


	Supervise and coordinate field marketers and sales agents
	Ensure effective territory coverage and route planning
	Monitor team performance and enforce daily productivity targets
	Provide coaching, guidance, and performance feedback to team members


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with distributors, retailers, and key accounts
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and retention
	Resolve escalated client issues promptly and professionally


Reporting & Performance Management:


	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports
	Track KPIs and provide insights to improve performance
	Ensure accurate documentation of sales activities and client data


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field with 3–5 years of experience in FMCG sales or business development
	Proven experience in team supervision and target-driven environments
	Strong knowledge of Port Harcourt market and distribution channels
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and leadership skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.


Key Competencies:


	Strong sales and commercial acumen
	Leadership and team management
	Strategic thinking and execution
	Customer relationship management
	Data-driven decision-making.


Salary
N250,000 - N350,000 / Month (Plus Performance Incentives).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location (E.g: "Business Development Supervisor – Either "Port Harcourt, Benin City Or Ibadan") as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Content Creator",
  "description": "Testify Limited is a Quality Assurance (QA) and Digital Assurance company committed to improving software reliability, performance, and user experience. We help organizations build secure, scalable, and high-performing digital products while also developing the next generation of software testing professionals. At Testify Limited, quality is not an afterthought &mdash; it is built into every stage of the software development lifecycle.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria

Job Summary


	We are looking for a highly creative, strategic, and execution-focused Content Creator to develop engaging, high-quality content that drives brand awareness, audience growth, and lead generation across all Testify Limited platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating compelling content across digital channels, supporting marketing campaigns, and translating technical concepts into relatable, engaging narratives that resonate with our audience.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute a content strategy aligned with business and growth objectives.
	Create high-quality content including articles, blog posts, social media content, videos, newsletters, and website copy.
	Translate technical QA and digital assurance concepts into engaging and easy-to-understand content.
	Manage and maintain content calendars across all platforms.
	Collaborate with marketing, sales, and partnerships teams to support campaigns and initiatives.
	Produce content that drives engagement, lead generation, and brand awareness.
	Optimize content for SEO and digital performance.
	Manage social media platforms and ensure consistent posting and engagement.
	Monitor content performance metrics and optimize based on insights.
	Support brand storytelling, thought leadership, and PR initiatives.
	Cover events, webinars, and training sessions through live or post-event content.
	Maintain consistency in brand voice, tone, and messaging across all channels.


Educational Qualification


	
	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Communications, Marketing, Media, Journalism, or related field.
	


Experience:


	1&ndash;3 years of experience in content creation, digital marketing, or social media management.
	Experience in tech, SaaS, or digital services is an added advantage.
	Proven portfolio of content (writing, video, or multimedia).


Skills and Competencies:


	Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills.
	Ability to simplify technical concepts into engaging content.
	Knowledge of content marketing, SEO, and social media strategies.
	Basic design and video editing skills (e.g., Canva, Adobe tools, CapCut).
	Strong creativity and attention to detail.
	Good understanding of digital trends and audience behavior.
	Analytical mindset with ability to interpret performance data.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Self-driven, proactive, and results-oriented mindset.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	Monthly salary of ?150,000 &ndash; ?200,000
	Opportunity for career growth
	Hybrid work mode.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;hrm@testifyltd.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Content Creator&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Content Creator Job at Testify Limited




        
    

        
        Testify Limited is a Quality Assurance (QA) and Digital Assurance company committed to improving software reliability, performance, and user experience. We help organizations build secure, scalable, and high-performing digital products while also developing the next generation of software testing professionals. At Testify Limited, quality is not an afterthought — it is built into every stage of the software development lifecycle.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Nigeria

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a highly creative, strategic, and execution-focused Content Creator to develop engaging, high-quality content that drives brand awareness, audience growth, and lead generation across all Testify Limited platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating compelling content across digital channels, supporting marketing campaigns, and translating technical concepts into relatable, engaging narratives that resonate with our audience.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute a content strategy aligned with business and growth objectives.
	Create high-quality content including articles, blog posts, social media content, videos, newsletters, and website copy.
	Translate technical QA and digital assurance concepts into engaging and easy-to-understand content.
	Manage and maintain content calendars across all platforms.
	Collaborate with marketing, sales, and partnerships teams to support campaigns and initiatives.
	Produce content that drives engagement, lead generation, and brand awareness.
	Optimize content for SEO and digital performance.
	Manage social media platforms and ensure consistent posting and engagement.
	Monitor content performance metrics and optimize based on insights.
	Support brand storytelling, thought leadership, and PR initiatives.
	Cover events, webinars, and training sessions through live or post-event content.
	Maintain consistency in brand voice, tone, and messaging across all channels.


Educational Qualification


	
	Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Marketing, Media, Journalism, or related field.
	


Experience:


	1–3 years of experience in content creation, digital marketing, or social media management.
	Experience in tech, SaaS, or digital services is an added advantage.
	Proven portfolio of content (writing, video, or multimedia).


Skills and Competencies:


	Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills.
	Ability to simplify technical concepts into engaging content.
	Knowledge of content marketing, SEO, and social media strategies.
	Basic design and video editing skills (e.g., Canva, Adobe tools, CapCut).
	Strong creativity and attention to detail.
	Good understanding of digital trends and audience behavior.
	Analytical mindset with ability to interpret performance data.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Self-driven, proactive, and results-oriented mindset.


Salary & Benefits


	Monthly salary of ?150,000 – ?200,000
	Opportunity for career growth
	Hybrid work mode.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using “Content Creator” as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Support Assistant",
  "description": "Pause Factory is a business and management consulting company that leverages people&rsquo;s emotions and performance architecture to solve organizational challenges and craft organizational transformation.

Pause Factory Resources, a leading Human Resources and Management Consulting firm, is expanding! We provide innovative corporate training solutions, recruitment, HR outsourcing, organizational assessments, culture alignment, wellness interventions, and more, helping businesses optimize performance and achieve strategic goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Support&nbsp;Assistant
Job Location:&nbsp;Town Planning / Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Office Assistant provides administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth and efficient operation of the office.
	The role involves handling routine office tasks, supporting staff, managing records, and maintaining an organized work environment.


Job Description
Administrative Duties:


	Answer and direct inquiries professionally
	Receive, sort, and distribute incoming correspondence and documents


Office Support:


	Manage office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Ensure office equipment is functional and report faults when needed
	Support staff with day-to-day administrative tasks


Record Keeping &amp; Documentation:


	Maintain accurate records and databases
	Assist with data entry and document updates
	Keep confidential information secure and properly stored


Front Desk &amp; Visitor Support:


	Welcome and assist visitors and clients
	Ensure a professional and organized reception area


General Office Maintenance:


	Keep work areas tidy and organized
	Assist in coordinating logistics for meetings, trainings, or events.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of a secondary school certificate or relevant qualification
	Proven experience in an administrative or office support role (preferred)
	Basic computer skills (MS Word, Excel, email)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Attention to detail and ability to multitask


Personal Attributes


	Professional and courteous demeanour
	Reliable and punctual
	Willingness to learn and take initiative
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N90,000-N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@pausefactory.org&nbsp;using &quot;Application &ndash; Office Support&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

Office Support Assistant Job at Pause Factory




        
    

        
        Pause Factory is a business and management consulting company that leverages people’s emotions and performance architecture to solve organizational challenges and craft organizational transformation.

Pause Factory Resources, a leading Human Resources and Management Consulting firm, is expanding! We provide innovative corporate training solutions, recruitment, HR outsourcing, organizational assessments, culture alignment, wellness interventions, and more, helping businesses optimize performance and achieve strategic goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Support Assistant
Job Location: Town Planning / Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	The Office Assistant provides administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth and efficient operation of the office.
	The role involves handling routine office tasks, supporting staff, managing records, and maintaining an organized work environment.


Job Description
Administrative Duties:


	Answer and direct inquiries professionally
	Receive, sort, and distribute incoming correspondence and documents


Office Support:


	Manage office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Ensure office equipment is functional and report faults when needed
	Support staff with day-to-day administrative tasks


Record Keeping & Documentation:


	Maintain accurate records and databases
	Assist with data entry and document updates
	Keep confidential information secure and properly stored


Front Desk & Visitor Support:


	Welcome and assist visitors and clients
	Ensure a professional and organized reception area


General Office Maintenance:


	Keep work areas tidy and organized
	Assist in coordinating logistics for meetings, trainings, or events.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Minimum of a secondary school certificate or relevant qualification
	Proven experience in an administrative or office support role (preferred)
	Basic computer skills (MS Word, Excel, email)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Attention to detail and ability to multitask


Personal Attributes


	Professional and courteous demeanour
	Reliable and punctual
	Willingness to learn and take initiative
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N90,000-N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application – Office Support" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
